_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: AIMS Golf Avenue I & II
project.address: Plot No. GH-03, Eco City, Sector 75, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201304
project.tagline: Integrated Gated Avenue Next to Metro
project.description: AIMS Golf Avenue is a premium ready-to-move-in residential complex in Sector 75, Noida, offering spacious and structural-sound 2, 3, and 4 BHK family apartments.
project.long_description: AIMS Golf Avenue (Phase I & II) is an established ready-to-move-in residential society spread over 4.94 acres in Central Noida, Sector 75. Developed by the Aims Group (under Aims Promoters Private Limited), the project houses 650 premium apartments across 7 elegant high-rise towers rising G+17 floors. Celebrated for its optimal spatial planning and direct metro connectivity, the complex features an 80% open-space layout dedicated to beautifully landscaped central gardens, jogging tracks, and family recreational zones. The apartments are exceptionally spacious, featuring laminated master bedroom floors, hardwood flush panels, and modular kitchen layouts. Located right opposite the Noida Sector 50 Metro Station and just 100 meters from the Spectrum Mall, the project delivers outstanding daily convenience. Resale buyers should perform standard title checks to verify individual flat registry status, as many units have registries pending due to outstanding land dues of the Eco City consortium to the Noida Authority.
marketing_claims: 80% Landscaped Open Area with Central Parks
Grand Clubhouse with Swimming Pool & Gym
project.project_risk_flag: Moderate-High: Stalled property registries due to outstanding consortium land dues of ₹1,717 Cr to Noida Authority. Standard bank loans blocked on unregistered units.
registry_embargo_reasons: Outstanding land lease dues of Eco City consortium with Noida Authority causing complete registry holds for several towers.

builder.name: AIMS Group
builder.company_overview: AIMS Group (AIMS Promoters Private Limited) is a mid-segment real estate developer in Noida and Ghaziabad. Known for practical residential layouts, active sports-centric amenities, and highly connected locations, the builder's flagship portfolio includes AIMS Golf Avenue and AIMS Golf Town, delivering comfortable multi-family apartments across central NCR.

unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 2 BHK
unit_types.description: Practical 2 BHK with double balconies, overlooking central landscaped parks.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Avenue Elite)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious family 3 BHK

unit_types.name: 4 BHK (Avenue Grande)
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial 4 BHK configuration
unit_types.description: Large-format 4 BHK featuring double lobby entry, dedicated servant room, and three-side open layout.

connectivity.name: Medanta Super-Speciality Hospital
connectivity.notes: Premium emergency healthcare across the road

assumptions: Ready-to-move resale unit purchase. GST is 0%.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Aims Golf Avenue offers highly practical ready-to-move-in configurations next to the metro at a suppressed resale value, though deeply affected by the wider Eco City registry embargo.
why_buy: Unbelievable Connectivity: Directly opposite Noida Sector 50 Metro and Spectrum Mall.
Generous Layout Specs: Massive 3 BHK at 1,595 sqft and 4 BHK at 2,350 sqft with double balconies.
Fully Settled Habitat: Fully ready complex with over 600 active families since 2015-16.
Highly Affordably Priced: SUP-to-carpet cost ratio is highly suppressed due to the title delays.
why_avoid: Unresolved Consortium Dues: M/s Aims Promoters is a main consortium partner facing the ₹1,717 Cr Noida land dues liability.
Frozen Registries: Property registration is completely frozen for multiple towers.
Slow Common Area Upgrades: Lift mechanics and security setups require active AOA management upgrades.
decision_profile.best_for: Buyers seeking spacious ready-to-move homes right next to the metro who are willing to wait for legal registration in exchange for highly suppressed resale values.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: First-time home buyers requiring clean legal titles for standard corporate bank financing on all units.

buyerPersonas.headline: Immediate space next to metro
reasons: 1,595 sqft 3 BHK offers sprawling living and double balconies.
Gated layout with swimming pool and active gym facilities.

riskRadar.description: Property registrations are largely stalled due to outstanding developer land dues to Noida Authority.
Upkeep of common lifts and fire equipment has faced delays.

transparency_checks.label: RERA Registered
transparency_checks.details: Registered as UPRERAPRJ6895 (Phase I) / UPRERAPRJ6952 (Phase II).

transparency_checks.label: OC / CC Received
transparency_checks.details: CC/OC is withheld due to outstanding land dues.

transparency_checks.label: Registry Active
transparency_checks.details: Registries are largely stalled as of mid-2026.

transparency_checks.label: Escrow Account
transparency_checks.details: No active escrow verified for legacy resale units.

transparency_checks.label: NCLT Moratorium
transparency_checks.details: No active NCLT bankruptcy against AIMS Promoters Pvt Ltd, but consortium is under fire.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent rental income but capital values are suppressed until dues resolution.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly popular among IT managers; 3 BHK rental commands ₹32,000 to ₹45,000/month.
investment_insights.market_desc: Consistent renter interest due to ready possession and metro walking distance.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Requires cash-heavy buyers as banks decline to finance unregistered units.

persona_descriptions.UPGRADER: Families prioritizing room size and direct metro access over luxury brand vertical lobbies, comfortable with title hold delays.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Moderate-High (willing to live without immediate registry in return for high square footage at highly discounted resale rates)
persona_profile.work_location: Noida IT hubs or Noida Expressway
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aims to acquire large family apartments right opposite Sector 50 Metro and Spectrum Mall, accepting the title deadlock in return for high super area value.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Only buy if you are a cash-rich buyer seeking highly spacious ready-to-move housing right next to the metro at deep resale discounts. Avoid if you require immediate legal registration.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Excellent day-to-day comfort with highly functional balcony spacing and Spectrum Mall right next door. Daily transit is extremely rapid.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Excellent for high monthly rental yield, but capital appreciation is constrained until the massive consortium land dues are cleared.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Secure gated layout with active children and senior parks.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Suppressed entry pricing yields highly competitive rental returns.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Fittings are good standard mid-premium, though common lobbies and lift-upkeep have faced minor maintenance lags.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: High legal/title risk. Strictly run title audits to ensure the resale seller has a clear builder allotment chain.
walk_away_conditions: Inability to execute a clear builder tripartite resale transfer.
Specific towers suffering from major structural seepages or lift malfunctions.
negotiation_leverage: Use the ₹1,717 Cr consortium land dues and frozen registries as massive leverage to squeeze down the resale price per sqft.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Do not rush. Take your time to locate highly motivated, cash-strapped sellers in the resale market who are willing to liquidate at ₹11,000 per sqft super area.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Slightly more spacious standard 3 BHK carpet areas.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Fully clean registry status; zero pending municipal dues; Mivan construction quality.
competitors.verdict: Choose Panchsheel for title security; choose AIMS Golf Avenue ONLY if budget is limited and you prioritize room sizes right opposite the metro.
competitors.price_delta_note: AIMS Golf Avenue is almost ₹2,000 per sqft cheaper.
